rationale: The citing paper is a broad methodological review on policy-simulation econometrics (exogeneity, stability, expectations) that also catalogs many 1998–2003 JMR articles, while the cited paper is an applied e-customization/email-click model and optimization study with limited topical overlap. But the only linkage evidence here is a bare DOI match (no in-text citation context), so it is not safe to conclude this is clearly incidental mention-only.
